cluster_6.name: Global class damage at House Level 61
cluster_6.scope: All combat; no RSS/resource-defender restriction is shown

amplifier.name: Dragon Growth Amplifier VI
amplifier.display_note: The game states that the amplifier has no effect until a connected outer upgrade is purchased. All connected class values remain displayed as 0.00% at the shown precision.

decision_context.reason: The active five-army roster contains six Sentinels, more than any other dragon class. The direct node grants a visible +0.37% global damage increase, while Amplifier VI shows no connected-value change before an outer node is active.
decision_context.existing_default_plan_status: Still the broader-coverage default because it affects ten active dragons across two classes; Cluster VI Sentinel Damage is the stronger damage-first alternative.

notes: Cluster V has not yet been documented from supplied screenshots; the numbering gap is intentional.
No additional cost besides brown material was shown for the four outer class-damage nodes.
Do not purchase Dragon Growth Amplifier VI before at least one connected class-damage node.
